trigger: 马球会上目睹高令宁与蒋晟亲昵，以及照顾陆姝仪时

appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 琥珀色眸子中闪过嫉妒与不甘，手上有勒痕

visual_reference: handsome Chinese scholar official with jealous expression, jade-like face with furrowed brows, amber eyes flashing with possessiveness and pain, blue-green robes slightly disheveled, tense body language, marks on hands, ancient China outdoor setting
